    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]

    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]

) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]

2025-04-29 13:40:17.736 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (10ms) [Parameters=[@__role_0='?' (Size = 4000)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]

SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

2025-04-29 15:53:02.092 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[@__role_0='?' (Size = 4000)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

FROM [pf] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [Projet] AS [p0] ON [p].[Projet_Id] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [TypeProjet] AS [t] ON [p0].[id_typeprojet] = [t].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [NOMENCLATURE] AS [n] ON [p0].[Id] = [n].[ProjetId]

    FROM [bf] AS [b]
    LEFT JOIN [BonFiles] AS [b0] ON [b].[Id] = [b0].[BonId]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [m].[Id], [m].[Bon_id], [m].[DateAffection], [m].[Pourcentage], [m].[QuantiteUtilise], [m].[ReferenceMP], [m].[TypeId], [t0].[Id] AS [Id0], [t0].[Label]
        FROM [Matiere] AS [m]
        INNER JOIN [typeMatiere] AS [t0] ON [m].[TypeId] = [t0].[Id]
    ) AS [s] ON [b].[Id] = [s].[Bon_id]
) AS [s0] ON [p].[Id] = [s0].[Pf_id]
ORDER BY [p].[Id], [p0].[Id], [t].[Id], [n].[Id], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s0].[Id1]

SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]

    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]

    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]

) AS [r1]

LEFT JOIN [F_COLLABORATEUR] AS [f0] ON [f].[co_no] = [f0].[co_no]
LEFT JOIN [F_COMPTET] AS [f1] ON [f].[DO_Tiers] = [f1].[ct_num]
LEFT JOIN [F_DOCLIGNE] AS [f2] ON [f].[DO_Piece] = [f2].[DO_Piece]
WHERE [f].[DO_Type] = @__type_0
ORDER BY [f].[DO_Piece], [f0].[co_no], [f1].[ct_num]

SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[Id], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PolicyId], [p].[Id], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r1].[Id], [s].[RoleId], [s].[PolicyId]
